data.title: Oil Prices Fall After Latest Spike, Dow Jones Futures Rise; Broadcom, Nvidia In Focus
data.description: Stocks in the Dow Jones and Russell 2000 continue to decline while crude oil prices have surged to their highest level since July 2024. Following the recent spike in oil prices, Dow Jones futures have seen a rise. Investors are now focusing on companies like Broadcom and Nvidia in the wake of these developments.

data.title: ExThera Medical Announces Resolution of Federal Investigation
data.description: A resolution has been reached between ExThera Medical and the U.S. Department of Justice, whereby ExThera has received significant acknowledgement for its cooperation in the investigation and the implementation of corrective actions. The announcement was made in Martinez, California on March 5, 2026. The details of the resolution highlight the efforts of ExThera in addressing the issues raised by the Department of Justice, reflecting a positive outcome for the company.

data.title: Global Times: China sets 4.5-5% GDP growth target for 2026 while striving to achieve better results in practice
data.description: In Beijing on March 5, 2026, China announced its economic growth target for the year, aiming for a range of 4.5 percent to 5 percent. The Government Work Report presented to the top legislature emphasized aspirations for even stronger performance. This annual growth objective falls within the specified range for the country's economic advancement.

Hezbollah in Lebanon has urged Israeli residents living within 5 kilometers of the border to leave their towns.

data.title: Global Times: China's national legislature opens annual session with 15th Five-Year Plan draft outlined; expert says long-term planning brings stability and highlights institutional strengths
data.description: On March 5, 2026, the 4th session of the 14th National People's Congress (NPC), China's primary legislative body, commenced at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing. Notable attendees included Xi Jinping and various Party and state officials.

data.title: Wolters Kluwer to host 2026 Future Ready Lawyer webinar series exploring how AI is reshaping the legal profession
data.description: A global webinar series presented by Wolters Kluwer Legal & Regulatory will delve into the impact of AI on the legal sector, analyzing its influence on work processes, business structures, and the balance of power within the profession. This seven-part series is an extension of the anticipated release of the 2026 Future Ready Lawyer report on March 10, incorporating fresh perspectives from industry pioneers and influential figures at the forefront of innovation. The aim of the webinar series is to explore how AI is reshaping legal practices and to provide valuable insights for legal professionals.
